---
name: Feature Request
about: Suggest an improvement or new feature
title: "[FEATURE] "
labels: enhancement
assignees: ''
---

## Is your feature request related to a problem?
A clear description of the problem. e.g. "I can't control X without..."

## Describe the solution you'd like
A clear description of what you want to happen.

## Device context
- Controller type: TOUCH-1 / REMOT_8CH / other
- Does the native PalLighting app support this feature?

## Additional context
Any other context, screenshots, or pcap captures.
